description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade includes a combination of smooth gray and white surfaces, accented by a section of vertical wooden slats and a recessed entryway. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically along the sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure appears to be single-story, with multiple roof levels and a small landscaped area near the entrance. The rear and side elevations are more utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a garage visible on one side. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, clean lines, and a mix of gray, white, and wood accents. Features large windows, a recessed entry, and a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with wood paneling, a recessed doorway, and a small landscaped area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical window arrangement and the elongated, minimalist facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof sections and minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage entrance and additional geometric roof elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with vertical wood slats, no steps, and a minimalist overhang.
